dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Executive overview of your imports
dashboard.emptyDesc: Create your first import to see landed-cost KPIs, cost breakdowns, and history here.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.subtitle: Manage supplier companies and trading terms
suppliers.emptyDesc: Add your first supplier to start building purchase orders.

products.emptyDesc: Add your first product to build purchase orders.

imports.chooseOrCreate: Select an existing import or create a new one to begin.

po.fobNote: FOB is calculated automatically from the lines and is never entered manually.
po.emptyLines: No lines yet — add a product to begin.
po.needProducts: Add products to the catalog first, then build the order here.

products.title: Product Catalog
products.subtitle: Reusable catalog of importable products (SKU, dimensions, FOB price)
features: Add/edit products: SKU, name, category, thickness, finish (1/2-side UV)
Dimensions with auto-calculated area (m²), weight, unit FOB price
Link products to suppliers
Unlimited products with search and filtering

purchaseOrder.title: Purchase Order
purchaseOrder.subtitle: Build an order from catalog products — FOB is always calculated
features: Select supplier and products, enter quantities
Auto-retrieve unit price, area, and weight from the catalog
Auto-calculate line totals, total quantity/weight/area, and FOB total
FOB is never entered manually (PRD rule)

logistics.title: Logistics
logistics.subtitle: International, destination, and customs-broker costs
features: International: ocean freight, insurance, BL service, other
Destination: deconsolidation, warehouse, handling, customs release, monitoring, port charges
Customs broker: brokerage, processing, local delivery, misc
Auto-calculated subtotals and total logistics cost

customs.title: Customs (SUNAT)
customs.subtitle: Peruvian customs duties and taxes
features: Inputs: exchange rate, Ad Valorem %, IGV %, IPM %, Perception %
Auto-calculated CIF and tax base
Ad Valorem, IGV, IPM, and Perception amounts
Total SUNAT taxes

allocation.title: Cost Allocation
allocation.subtitle: Distribute logistics and taxes across products
features: Allocation methods: by quantity, weight, area (m²), or FOB value
Proportional logistics and tax allocation per product
Final table: FOB, logistics, tax, landed cost, cost/unit, cost/m²
Recomputed instantly by the shared calc engine

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Selling prices and margins from landed cost
features: Selling price, gross profit, and margin per tier
Custom target margin
Driven by the landed cost from allocation

history.title: Import History
history.subtitle: Every saved import, with comparison
features: Record per import: date, supplier, FOB, logistics, taxes, total cost
Compare imports side by side
Cost evolution over time
Excel/JSON export and import (secure library TBD)

simulator.title: Scenario Simulator
simulator.subtitle: Change inputs and see landed cost recalculate instantly
features: Adjust exchange rate, freight, insurance, tax rates, quantities
Everything recalculates instantly (client-side engine)
Compare against the base scenario
No round-trips — pure in-browser math
